subject: Re: Boxnet model not visible for selection
body:
For clarity I'm adding to the above post a picture of the installed warp 
and models to show that they are indeed there:

[image: Screen Shot 2021-06-13 at 2.18.21 PM.png]

On Sunday, June 13, 2021 at 1:38:45 PM UTC-4 marka...@gmail.com wrote:

> Dear Warp community,
>
> We are using a Window 10 workstation with a GTX 1080 with 8GB GPU. We 
> recently installed Warp ver. 1.0.9 on June 3rd. We are currently unable to 
> utilize Boxnet for particle picking despite it being installed in the 
> installation directory. 
>
>
> Directory Local: Users/…/AppData/Roaming/Warp/boxnet2dmodels
>
> When in Warp and “pick particles” is selected, attempting to select the 
> Boxnet models shows no models available (see attached screenshot).
>
> Our workstation has a total of 32 GB RAM and 12 CPUs (Hex-core Intel 
> processor).  
>
> Windows OS Version: Windows 10 Home 20H2 (Build: 19042.1052)
>
>
